text:
A Stay CHAR 2 Indicates the resident's ability to move to a standing position from a sitting position in a chair or on the side of
the bed at the start of the SNF PPS Part A stay. -=Not assessed/no information
 01=Dependent
 02=Substantial/maximal assistance
 03=Partial/moderate assistance
 04=Supervision or touching assistance
 05=Setup or clean-up assistance
 06=Independent
 07=Resident refused
 09=Not applicable
 88=Not attempted due to medical condition or safety concerns
